/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/game_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libgame_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/game_controller_interface/libgame_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/game_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/game_controller_interface/msg/_game_control_data_s.c.o CMakeFiles/game_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/game_controller_interface/msg/_robot_info_s.c.o CMakeFiles/game_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/game_controller_interface/msg/_team_info_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/baro/Downloads/Football/K1_Football_Demo/build/game_controller_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/libpython3.14.so libgame_controller_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libgame_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
